activities.name: Imperial Palace East Gardens
activities.notes: Free entry to the East Gardens of the Imperial Palace. Beautiful traditional Japanese garden in the heart of Tokyo.
activities.place: Imperial Palace East Garden, Tokyo, Japan

activities.name: Ginza
activities.notes: Tokyo's most upscale shopping district. Apple Store, flagship boutiques, great architecture. Wako department store at Ginza crossing.

activities.name: Tsukiji Outer Market
activities.notes: The famous market's outer section is still bustling with sushi, tamagoyaki, street food. 10-min walk from Ginza.

activities.name: Senso-ji Temple & Nakamise
activities.notes: Tokyo's oldest temple. Kaminarimon Gate, Nakamise shopping street. Go early to beat crowds.

activities.name: 🍴 Asakusa Lunch
activities.notes: Try Asakusa Imahan for sukiyaki/shabu-shabu, or Daikokuya for the famous tempura don.

activities.name: Tokyo Skytree
activities.notes: World's tallest tower (634m). Two observation decks — Tembo Deck (350m) and Tembo Galleria (450m). Book online.

activities.name: Transfer to Narita Airport
activities.notes: Flight departs 03:05. Take last Narita Express or arrange private transfer the night before.
